data.name: SEX KINGDOM
data.detailed_description:
SEX KINGDOM - is a simple 2D game for adults in which you have to uncover hot images of beautiful ladies.

The concept of the game is extremely straightforward: using a ball, you break the necessary blocks of the level and gradually reveal a spicy image. After completing each level, you can fully enjoy these images.

It's worth noting that this game not only develops your visual memory, but also improves your motor skills and attentiveness. And the pleasant soundtrack will keep you entertained and prevent boredom. Have fun playing!

KEY FEATURES:

  • STEAM ACHIEVEMENTS.

  • Enjoyable and relaxing gameplay.

  • Melodic soundtrack.

  • Develop your memory and attentiveness.

  • Enjoyment at every level.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® XP / Vista / 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1GB
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
